story.text:
# ✨ Inscribe Shielded
**✉️ → 🔒(zcash-shielded) → ⛓️(block) → 📜**
*memora · inscription · V41*

Inscribe a memo with Zcash Pattern A: the memo is shielded, addressed only to its recipient, and bound to a specific block height.

> Permanence and privacy meet at the shielded memo. Only the addressee may read; only the chain may forget at its own pace.

*Keywords:* inscribe · shielded · zcash · memo · v5 · pattern-a
